```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# WGBS 分析流程 - Step 5: 功能富集与 GSEA
# ==============================================================================
# 这一节从甲基化关联到的基因出发，先做传统 ORA，再做 rank-based GSEA。

enrichment_plot_dir <- "result/5_enrichment/plots/1"
enrichment_table_dir <- "result/5_enrichment/tables/1"
ensure_step_dirs(enrichment_plot_dir, enrichment_table_dir)

ensure_dmr_outputs_loaded()

# 1 富集输入数据准备
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 使用甲基化注释的基因进行富集分析（不依赖RNA-seq数据）
# 这里先把同一基因对应的多个 DMR 收敛成“绝对效应最大的一个”，避免富集重复计数。
message("   Section 4: 使用甲基化差异区域(DMR)注释的基因进行富集分析. DMR数量: ", nrow(dmr_anno_df))

# 准备基因列表 (Gene List) 用于后续分析
# 策略：对于每个基因，如果有多个 DMR，取 diffMethy 绝对值最大的那个
if(!("gene_id_clean" %in% colnames(dmr_anno_df)) && "geneId" %in% colnames(dmr_anno_df)) {
  dmr_anno_df$gene_id_clean <- str_replace(dmr_anno_df$geneId, "\\..*$", "")
}

gene_df_unique <- dmr_anno_df %>%
  group_by(gene_id_clean) %>%
  summarise(
    diffMethy = diffMethy[which.max(abs(diffMethy))]
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 转换 ID (Ensembl -> Entrez & Symbol)
gene_map <- tryCatch({
  bitr(gene_df_unique$gene_id_clean, fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"), OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db)
}, error = function(e) NULL)

if(is.null(gene_map)) {
  message("Warning: ID mapping failed in Section 4.")
  gene_df_final <- data.frame()
} else {
  gene_df_final <- inner_join(gene_df_unique, gene_map, by = c("gene_id_clean" = "ENSEMBL"))
  # 去重
  gene_df_final <- gene_df_final %>% distinct(gene_id_clean, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

# 准备 geneList (用于 cnetplot 等)
geneList <- gene_df_final$diffMethy
names(geneList) <- gene_df_final$SYMBOL
geneList <- sort(geneList, decreasing = TRUE)

# 提取显著基因的 Entrez ID
sig_genes <- unique(gene_df_final$ENTREZID)

message("用于富集分析的基因数量：", length(sig_genes))

# WGBS gene universe
# WGBS 可检测基因受 CpG 密度、覆盖度和基因长度影响。默认背景会偏向全基因组注释基因，
# 这里优先使用“至少有 WGBS CpG 覆盖并能映射到 Entrez 的基因”作为 universe。
# 如果构建失败，仍保留原 clusterProfiler 默认背景以保证流程可运行。
universe_status_file <- file.path(enrichment_table_dir, "wgbs_gene_universe_status.csv")
wgbs_universe <- tryCatch({
  ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
  txdb_for_universe <- load_main_chr_txdb(config$gtf_file)
  build_wgbs_gene_universe(
    obj_list = obj.cpg,
    sample_ids_arg = sample_ids,
    config_arg = config,
    txdb_arg = txdb_for_universe,
    min_groups = 1L,
    min_samples = 1L,
    cache_file = file.path(enrichment_table_dir, "wgbs_gene_universe.csv")
  )
}, error = function(e) {
  write_csv(tibble(step = "wgbs_gene_universe", status = "error", message = e$message), universe_status_file)
  NULL
})

enrich_universe <- NULL
if(!is.null(wgbs_universe) && nrow(wgbs_universe) > 0 && "ENTREZID" %in% colnames(wgbs_universe)) {
  enrich_universe <- unique(wgbs_universe$ENTREZID[!is.na(wgbs_universe$ENTREZID)])
  write_csv(
    tibble(step = "wgbs_gene_universe", status = "ok", message = paste(length(enrich_universe), "Entrez genes")),
    universe_status_file
  )
} else if(!file.exists(universe_status_file)) {
  write_csv(tibble(step = "wgbs_gene_universe", status = "skipped", message = "using clusterProfiler default universe"), universe_status_file)
}

# 2 KEGG 功能富集分析
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 同时保留完整结果和 pvalue < 0.05 的结果，便于后面溯源和换图。
# 当前继续沿用 pvalue < 0.05 的展示口径；最终投稿/严格筛选建议同时报告 p.adjust 或 qvalue < 0.05。
message("Running KEGG enrichment...")
kegg_enrich <- enrichKEGG(gene = sig_genes,
                          organism = "mmu",
                          universe = enrich_universe,
                          pvalueCutoff = 1,
                          qvalueCutoff = 1)

if(!is.null(kegg_enrich) && nrow(as.data.frame(kegg_enrich)) > 0) {
  kegg_enrich <- setReadable(kegg_enrich, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID")
  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg_enrich), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/kegg_enrichment_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  kegg_enrich@result <- kegg_enrich@result[kegg_enrich@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg_enrich), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/kegg_enrichment_results_p_lt_0_05.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # KEGG 可视化 (统一配色)
  save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(kegg_enrich), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/kegg_barplot.pdf",
                   "KEGG Pathway Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(kegg_enrich), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/kegg_dotplot.pdf",
                   "KEGG Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_enrichment_cnetplot(kegg_enrich, geneList,
                           "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/kegg_cnetplot.pdf",
                           "KEGG Cnetplot", showCategory = 5)
}
```

```{r}
# 3 GO 功能富集分析
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# GO 按 BP / MF / CC / ALL 分开运行，后面不同图型直接复用各自结果对象。
message("Running GO enrichment...")

# 分别运行 BP, MF, CC, ALL
go_bp <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = enrich_universe, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE)
go_mf <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = enrich_universe, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "MF", pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE)
go_cc <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = enrich_universe, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "CC", pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE)
go_all <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = enrich_universe, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "ALL", pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE)

# 保存未过滤结果
if(!is.null(go_bp)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_bp), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_bp_enrichment_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_mf)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_mf), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_mf_enrichment_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_cc)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_cc), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_cc_enrichment_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_all)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_all), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_all_enrichment_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 过滤pvalue<0.05并保存，用于后续绘图
if(!is.null(go_bp)) go_bp@result <- go_bp@result[go_bp@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
if(!is.null(go_mf)) go_mf@result <- go_mf@result[go_mf@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
if(!is.null(go_cc)) go_cc@result <- go_cc@result[go_cc@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]
if(!is.null(go_all)) go_all@result <- go_all@result[go_all@result$pvalue < config$enrichment_p_threshold, ]

if(!is.null(go_bp)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_bp), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_bp_enrichment_results_p_lt_0_05.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_mf)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_mf), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_mf_enrichment_results_p_lt_0_05.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_cc)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_cc), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_cc_enrichment_results_p_lt_0_05.csv", row.names = FALSE)
if(!is.null(go_all)) write.csv(as.data.frame(go_all), "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/go_all_enrichment_results_p_lt_0_05.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 计算相似度 (用于 treeplot)
if(!is.null(go_bp) && nrow(go_bp) > 0) go_bp <- pairwise_termsim(go_bp)
if(!is.null(go_mf) && nrow(go_mf) > 0) go_mf <- pairwise_termsim(go_mf)
if(!is.null(go_cc) && nrow(go_cc) > 0) go_cc <- pairwise_termsim(go_cc)
if(!is.null(go_all) && nrow(go_all) > 0) go_all <- pairwise_termsim(go_all)
```

```{r}
# BP 可视化
if(nrow(go_bp) > 0) {
  save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(go_bp), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_barplot.pdf",
                   "GO BP Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(go_bp), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_dotplot.pdf",
                   "GO BP Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_enrichment_cnetplot(go_bp, geneList,
                           "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_cnetplot.pdf",
                           "GO BP Cnetplot", showCategory = 5)
  save_enrichment_treeplot(go_bp, "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_treeplot.pdf",
                           "GO BP Treeplot", showCategory = 15)
  
  # Chord & Cluster (GOplot，使用统一 helper)
  gp_inputs <- build_goplot_inputs(as.data.frame(go_bp), geneList, category_label = "BP", top_n = 10)
  save_go_goplot_bundle(gp_inputs,
                        "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_chord.pdf",
                        "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_cluster.pdf",
                        title_suffix = "BP")
  
  # UpSet Plot
  tryCatch({
      go_df_raw <- as.data.frame(go_bp)
      top_go <- go_df_raw %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% head(15)
      gene_sets <- list()
      for(i in seq_len(nrow(top_go))) {
        genes <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(top_go$geneID[i]), "/"))
        genes <- genes[genes != ""]
        if(length(genes) > 0) {
          set_name <- as.character(top_go$Description[i])
          if(nchar(set_name) > 30) set_name <- paste0(substr(set_name, 1, 30), "...")
          gene_sets[[set_name]] <- genes
        }
      }
      if(length(gene_sets) >= 2) {
        cairo_pdf("result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_bp_upset.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
        print(upset(fromList(gene_sets), nsets = length(gene_sets), nintersects = 20,
                    order.by = "freq", sets.bar.color = viz_pal$upset_sets,
                    main.bar.color = viz_pal$upset_main, text.scale = c(1.3, 1.3, 1, 1, 1.3, 1)))
        dev.off()
      }
  }, error = function(e) cat("GO BP UpSet Error:", e$message, "\n"))
}

# MF 可视化
if(nrow(go_mf) > 0) {
  save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(go_mf), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_mf_barplot.pdf",
                   "GO MF Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(go_mf), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_mf_dotplot.pdf",
                   "GO MF Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_enrichment_cnetplot(go_mf, geneList,
                           "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_mf_cnetplot.pdf",
                           "GO MF Cnetplot", showCategory = 5)
  save_enrichment_treeplot(go_mf, "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_mf_treeplot.pdf",
                           "GO MF Treeplot", showCategory = 15)
}

# CC 可视化
if(nrow(go_cc) > 0) {
  save_ora_barplot(as.data.frame(go_cc), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_cc_barplot.pdf",
                   "GO CC Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_ora_dotplot(as.data.frame(go_cc), "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_cc_dotplot.pdf",
                   "GO CC Enrichment", top_n = 15)
  save_enrichment_cnetplot(go_cc, geneList,
                           "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_cc_cnetplot.pdf",
                           "GO CC Cnetplot", showCategory = 5)
  save_enrichment_treeplot(go_cc, "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/go_cc_treeplot.pdf",
                           "GO CC Treeplot", showCategory = 15)
}

```

```{r}
# 4 Rank-based 富集分析 (GSEA)
# ==============================================================================
# 和 ORA 不同，这里保留连续效应值，更适合捕捉“整体偏移但单基因不过阈值”的通路。
message("Running rank-based methylation GSEA...")

if(exists("gene_df_final") && nrow(gene_df_final) > 0) {
  meth_rank <- gene_df_final$diffMethy
  names(meth_rank) <- gene_df_final$ENTREZID
  meth_rank <- meth_rank[!is.na(names(meth_rank)) & !duplicated(names(meth_rank))]
  build_gsea_plots(
    rank_vec = meth_rank,
    prefix = "result/5_enrichment/tables/1/methylation",
    title_prefix = "Methylation Rank",
    plot_prefix = "result/5_enrichment/plots/1/methylation"
  )
}
```
